top_signals.title: Trump Says Iran, Israel Look to Agree Truce After Fresh Strikes
top_signals.summary: US President Donald Trump said Israel and Iran are looking to agree to an immediate ceasefire following a series of tit-for-tat strikes that threatened to derail talks aimed at ending the war in the Middle East.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Is Time on China’s Side? Beijing’s Taiwan Calculus and the Balance of Power
top_signals.summary:
When is the risk of war the highest? And what should the United States be doing about it? One of the most important but underappreciated questions in international politics is how states think about the future balance of power. Countries that believe their position is improving often choose patience. Those who fear their position is deteriorating may feel pressure to act before their advantages disappear. In this episode, Ryan is joined by Dean Cheng, Mira Rapp-Hooper, and Amanda Hsiao to explore how Chinese leaders may be thinking about time, power, and Taiwan. This episode is sponsored by Kibu, which ensures you always know

top_signals.title: Apple Investors Look for AI Overhaul to Power Next Leg of Gains
top_signals.summary: Apple Inc. investors have spent nearly two years clamoring for the iPhone maker to make a big splash with artificial intelligence. Their wait may finally be coming to an end next week at the company’s annual Worldwide Developers Conference.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: JPMorgan says Strategy may need to rebuild dollar reserves to restore confidence
top_signals.summary: JPMorgan said crypto's outlook depends on Strategy's dividend plan and the Clarity Act, for which it now sees less than a 50% chance of passage this year.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.summary: The United States Merchant Marine Academy (USMMA) announced that U.S. Secretary of the Army Daniel Driscoll will deliver the 90th commencement address at USMMA for the Class of 2026 on Monday, June 22.“We are excited to welcome Secretary Driscoll to Kings Point.
